themes.label: Obedience
themes.summary: This chapter stresses hearing, keeping, following, or walking in God’s commands. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 5 verses. Commentary leans on "Ye shall do my judgments, and keep mine ordinances, to walk therein: I am the LORD your God....". Word-study detail reinforces "חֻקֹּתַי֙: my statutes - a statute".

themes.label: Presence
themes.summary: This chapter highlights God’s nearness, abiding presence, indwelling, or covenant companionship. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "None of you shall approach to any that is near of kin to him, to uncover their nakedness: I a...". Word-study detail reinforces "אֶל: - near, with or among; often in general, to".
